cards.title: OpenAI Targets Families with Dedicated Product Manager
cards.body: OpenAI is hiring a dedicated product manager to build ChatGPT experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults. The move signals the company's expansion beyond enterprise users into household products.

cards.title: Meta Removes Controversial Instagram AI Feature
cards.body: Meta has discontinued an AI feature on Instagram after user backlash over content usage. The company acknowledged the feature "missed the mark" despite intentions to provide creative control.

cards.title: Apple Sues OpenAI Over Trade Secrets
cards.body: Apple filed a lawsuit alleging OpenAI leadership directed misconduct involving trade secret theft. The suit involves a former Apple employee now at OpenAI.

cards.title: Hugging Face CEO: Open Source AI Thriving
cards.body: Open source AI is booming, with Hugging Face now used by roughly half of Fortune 500 companies. The platform operates as a GitHub-equivalent where builders share models and datasets.

cards.title: SK Hynix Raises $26.5B in Historic IPO
cards.body: SK Hynix completed the largest foreign IPO in US history, riding the AI chip boom wave. U.S. officials are now pushing the company to build domestic manufacturing facilities.

cards.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Powers Microsoft Copilot 365
cards.body: OpenAI announced that GPT-5.6 is the preferred model for Microsoft's Copilot 365 suite. The partnership continues despite ongoing speculation about potential breakup.

cards.title: OpenAI's No. 2 Executive Fidji Simo Departs
cards.body: Fidji Simo is stepping down from her role as OpenAI's second-in-command after extended medical leave. The departure creates a leadership gap amid IPO plans and competition with Anthropic.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.6 Model Family
cards.body: OpenAI released its latest model family, GPT-5.6, with improvements across cybersecurity and other domains. The new models represent the company's continued advancement in frontier AI capabilities.

cards.title: AI Agent Startup Raises $100M Via Its Own AI
cards.body: Lyzr, an AI agent startup, used its own AI to manage a $100 million fundraise. The successful funding round demonstrates the capability of enterprise AI agents in real-world deployment.

cards.title: OpenAI Sunsets AI Browser, Pivots to Extensions
cards.body: OpenAI is discontinuing its Atlas AI-powered browser after less than a year. The company is migrating agentic browsing features to its desktop app and Chrome extension instead.

cards.title: Elon Musk Backs Anthropic Hosting on xAI
cards.body: Elon Musk pledged not to "cut off" Anthropic and praised its partnership with AI infrastructure providers. The endorsement addresses concerns about hosting sensitive AI models on Musk-affiliated infrastructure.

cards.title: AI ROI Debate Intensifies with Trillions at Stake
cards.body: The debate over AI return on investment has resurfaced with unprecedented financial stakes involved. Questions remain about demonstrable business value from massive AI investments.

cards.title: Meta Launches Muse Spark 1.1 Coding AI
cards.body: Meta entered the AI coding space with Muse Spark 1.1, designed for large agentic workloads and automated migrations. The tool targets enterprises seeking advanced code automation capabilities.

cards.title: New York Times Claims OpenAI Hid Evidence
cards.body: The New York Times alleges OpenAI concealed tools and datasets identifying copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT. Publishers escalated their copyright lawsuit with a new motion for sanctions.

cards.title: Google Mandates AI Disclosure for All Ads
cards.body: Google now requires disclosure when ads use AI-generated or altered content, expanding rules previously limited to election ads. The policy covers synthetically created content across all ad categories.

cards.title: Gradium Raises $100M for AI Voice Tech
cards.body: Paris-based AI voice startup Gradium secured a $100 million seed round backed by Nvidia. The company is opening a Bay Area office to compete for top AI talent.

cards.title: Government Safety Review for Frontier AI Models Unclear
cards.body: The exact process for government approval of OpenAI and Anthropic's frontier models remains opaque. Regulatory oversight mechanisms for cutting-edge AI development need clearer definition.

cards.title: Instagram Users Can Opt Out of AI Image Generation
cards.body: Meta's Muse Image feature allows AI generation using photos from public Instagram accounts without explicit consent. Users can now prevent their public photos from being used in AI creations.

cards.title: Meta's Custom AI Chips Enter Production September
cards.body: Meta is taking a modular approach to chip design, anticipating rapid AI evolution over production timelines. The strategy allows for flexible updates as company needs change.

cards.title: OpenAI Targets Families with Dedicated Product Manager
cards.body: ChatGPT is hiring a product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults. The move signals OpenAI's expansion beyond individual users into household ecosystems.

cards.title: Meta Removes Controversial AI Feature from Instagram
cards.body: Meta has discontinued an AI feature that referenced public Instagram content after user backlash. The company acknowledged the feature missed the mark in providing user control.

cards.title: Apple Sues OpenAI Over Trade Secret Theft
cards.body: Apple alleges OpenAI misappropriated trade secrets with direction from senior leadership. The lawsuit involves a former Apple employee now at OpenAI.

cards.title: Open Source AI Booming, Says Hugging Face CEO
cards.body: Hugging Face has grown into a GitHub-like platform for AI models and datasets used by roughly half of Fortune 500 companies. CEO Clem Delangue sees open source as the future of AI development.

cards.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Powers Microsoft Copilot 365
cards.body: OpenAI's new model family will continue powering Microsoft's workplace and productivity applications. The partnership deepens as both companies compete in enterprise AI.

cards.title: OpenAI's No. 2 Executive Steps Down From Role
cards.body: Fidji Simo is departing her full-time position following extended medical leave. The leadership gap comes as OpenAI pursues an IPO and competes with Anthropic.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.6 Model Family
cards.body: The new models promise improvements across multiple areas including cybersecurity capabilities. OpenAI continues its rapid release cycle ahead of potential competition.

cards.title: AI Agent Startup Raises $100M Using Own Agent
cards.body: Lyzr used its own AI agent to manage a $100 million fundraising round. The move demonstrates practical enterprise value of the company's agentic AI technology.

cards.title: OpenAI Shuts Down Atlas AI Browser
cards.body: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. The company is moving agentic browsing features to a desktop app and Chrome extension.

cards.title: Meta Launches Muse Spark 1.1 AI Coding Tool
cards.body: Meta's new tool handles large agentic workloads, bug fixes, and code migrations for enterprises. The release marks Meta's entry into the competitive AI coding space.

cards.title: New York Times Claims OpenAI Hid Evidence
cards.body: Publishers allege OpenAI concealed tools that could identify copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs. The lawsuit escalates with new sanctions motions regarding hidden datasets.

cards.title: Google Requires AI Disclosure in Ads
cards.body: Google now mandates disclosure when ads use AI-generated or digitally altered content. The policy expands beyond election ads to all synthetic media.

cards.title: Nvidia-Backed AI Voice Startup Raises $100M
cards.body: Gradium, a Paris-based startup, secured $100 million in seed funding backed by Nvidia. The company is opening a Bay Area office to compete for AI talent.

cards.title: Government Approval of OpenAI Models Remains Unclear
cards.body: Details about how government agencies vetted OpenAI's frontier models for safety remain opaque. Dialogue between regulators and AI companies lacks public transparency.

cards.title: Meta's New AI Chips Enter Production September
cards.body: Meta is using a modular design approach for its chips anticipating rapid AI evolution. Production begins as the company pursues AI infrastructure independence.

cards.title: Anthropic Discovers Hidden Layer in Claude AI
cards.body: Anthropic developed a technique revealing how Claude's reasoning works internally. Researchers found both mundane and unnerving patterns in the AI's decision-making process.
